instruction: Fill the audio semantic mask based on the given conditions:
caption: Upbeat 2020s art-pop with massive crossover energy and an instantly-recognizable hook. Intimate female vocal in the verses — close and present in the mix, clearly articulated and upfront — opening quickly into a soaring, anthemic chorus with bright, clear layered harmonies. Instrumentation blends shimmering layered synth pads, glitchy digital textures, a pulsing four-on-the-floor electronic beat, and warm organic piano touches grounding the digital textures in something human. Maximalist, polished modern production with controlled reverb that keeps vocals forward and intelligible, hyper-processed vocal stutters, and subtle pitch-bent vocal chops as accents. Short, punchy intro leading quickly into a euphoric, wall-of-sound chorus, brief stripped-back bridge, then final chorus hits even bigger. Dreamy, emotionally vulnerable mood — beauty blurring into unreality, like memory and simulation overlapping. Mid-to-uptempo hypnotic looping groove with a danceable but melancholic undertow, vocals always clear and present above the mix.
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Static hums on the glass
Watch the memories pass
Silver light in the room
Flowers trying to bloom
Is it all just a frame?
Nothing feels quite the same

[Pre-Chorus]
The borders are melting, the logic is gone
I reach for a shadow and keep holding on
The rhythm is pulling me into the deep

[Chorus]
I AM LOSING THE THREAD (lost again)
LIVING INSIDE MY HEAD (in my head)
NOTHING IS WHAT IT SEEMS (what it seems)
ONLY SYNTHETIC DREAMS (in my dreams)
WE ARE DRIFTING AWAY (drift away)
A BEAUTIFUL DECAY (decay)

[Verse 2]
Perfect smile on the feed
Is it something I need?
Liquid shapes in the night
Bathing in hollow light
Every tear is designed
Leaving the truth behind

[Pre-Chorus]
The borders are melting, the logic is gone
I reach for a shadow and keep holding on
The rhythm is pulling me into the deep

[Chorus]
I AM LOSING THE THREAD (lost again)
LIVING INSIDE MY HEAD (in my head)
NOTHING IS WHAT IT SEEMS (what it seems)
ONLY SYNTHETIC DREAMS (in my dreams)
WE ARE DRIFTING AWAY (drift away)
A BEAUTIFUL DECAY (decay)

[Bridge]
(Ooh, ooh)
A perfect illusion, a digital tear
I miss a moment that never was here
Stuck in a circle of zero and one
Where does the fantasy finally run?
(Finally run)

[Chorus]
I AM LOSING THE THREAD (lost again)
LIVING INSIDE MY HEAD (in my head)
NOTHING IS WHAT IT SEEMS (what it seems)
ONLY SYNTHETIC DREAMS (in my dreams)
WE ARE DRIFTING AWAY (drift away)
A BEAUTIFUL DECAY (decay)

[Outro]
Just a glow in the glass (in the glass)
Let the unreality pass
(Is it real?)
(Fade out)
